overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player exploring a desert market stall on the outskirts of Night City, then walking across an open wasteland toward a drainage tunnel, and finally traversing the long concrete tunnel interior. The clip transitions from a semi-covered vendor area to bright desert landscape with a distant futuristic skyline, ending in an artificially lit underground passage.

events.description: camera pans right past mannequins toward seated NPCs in the shade
exits the covered market canopy into bright open desert

agents.ego_description: walking through the market area, examining clothing racks and NPCs before heading toward the exit

man in white shirt sitting on wooden barrels

entered.detail: corrugated metal roof structure providing shade over the vendor area
metal rack with hanging jackets and shirts
retro-style gaming cabinet with glowing screen near the exit
stacked barrels used as seating by NPCs

segments.scene_description: The player explores a makeshift market stall under a metal canopy in the desert badlands. Clothing racks, mannequins, and an arcade machine are visible as the camera pans across the area, passing by seated NPCs and graffiti-covered walls before heading toward the bright desert exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert wasteland with distant city skyline

events.description: exits covered market into bright desert sunlight with city skyline visible
begins approaching the concrete tunnel entrance set into red rock hillside

agents.ego_description: walking across the open desert terrain toward the drainage tunnel entrance

entered.detail: futuristic skyscrapers with holographic billboards visible in the distance
large desert hillside with layered rock strata
desert yucca tree casting long shadow on the ground
concrete drainage tunnel mouth set into the rock face

segments.scene_description: Exiting the market shelter, the scene opens into a bright desert wasteland with the Night City skyline visible in the distance. The player walks across sandy terrain alongside a paved road, approaching a concrete drainage tunnel entrance set into a red rock hillside.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete drainage tunnel with overhead lighting

events.description: enters the dark tunnel from the bright desert environment
transition from natural sunlight to dim artificial tunnel lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the long concrete tunnel toward the bright exit light visible at the far end

entered.detail: smooth concrete walls with red tile sections near the entrance
fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the tunnel ceiling
concrete trough running down the center of the tunnel floor
bright white light visible at the distant tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The player enters the long concrete drainage tunnel, transitioning from bright sunlight to dim artificial lighting. The tunnel features smooth concrete walls, overhead fluorescent lights, and a central drainage channel as the player walks steadily toward the bright exit light visible at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a cluttered desert outpost into the stark interior of a concrete drainage system. It begins under a metal canopy at a makeshift market, panning past clothing racks, mannequins, and graffiti-covered walls before moving toward the bright desert exit. As the camera leaves the shelter, the scene opens into a vast, sun-drenched wasteland where the player walks along a paved road toward a red rock hillside with the distant Night City skyline on the horizon. The movement then shifts as the camera enters a concrete drainage tunnel, transitioning from the blinding sunlight to dim artificial lighting. Finally, the view settles into a steady walk through the smooth concrete passage, guided by overhead fluorescent lights toward a bright exit at the far end.
